title: santolina chamaecyparissus var. lanata
intro: Santolina chamaecyparissus var. lanata, also known as woolly grey cotton lavender, is a perennial shrub native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be attributed to its essential oils and other bioactive compounds. The medicinal properties of Santolina chamaecyparissus var. lanata have been found to have various health benefits, including reducing anxiety and stress, improving digestion, and promoting skin health. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally or used topically to harness its medicinal properties.
